topIngredients.name: Beta-Glucan
topIngredients.benefit: Oat-derived ingredient that soothes and strengthens the skin barrier

topIngredients.name: Ceramides
topIngredients.benefit: Locks in moisture and prevents moisture evaporation

topIngredients.name: Tea Tree Extract
topIngredients.benefit: Mild antimicrobial to keep skin clear

verdict: Laneige Cream Skin Refiner functions more as a toner-moisturizer hybrid than a traditional mask. Its cream-in-water texture is unique in the market and works best as a hydrating step between cleansing and moisturizing.
